subject: Re: pilots schedule
body:
sarah, please buy a chiropractic wedge,(duckbill), a heart block, from a yoga journal,   

----- Original Message ----
From: "kellens@earthlink.net" <kellens@earthlink.net>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Thursday, January 4, 2007 11:15:56 AM
Subject: pilots schedule

Hello Sarah,
If you could pass this on to JE, pilots schedule for the next few weeks,
I am having Dave, Bill and Morrison fly trip Sunday morning 7am to Newark.
I will leave Sunday night from Palm Beach to Dallas for Gulfstream training.
Jan 8, Monday till Friday 12th.
 
Monday and Tuesday, Morrison is completeing routine maintainance on Boeing in Newark for 2 days.
 
Same crew will fry Friday EWR to BED to LSJ,, Dave, Hammond and Morrionson on Friday.
 
I will pick up the flying on Jan 15 from LSJ to EWR.
Then Dave, Morrison and I will take Paris trip,,,,I have Bill Hammond in Boeing school Jan 18 - 25 while
we are in Paris with Boeing.




__________________________________________________
Do You Yahoo!?
Tired of spam?  Yahoo! Mail has the best spam protection around 
http://mail.yahoo.com
